notes: Statistical-communique values are from a public reprint. General-budget debt and fiscal-balance values are from the 2025 CCXI tracking-rating report; expenditure is calculated from the reported fiscal balance ratio. The rating report says Bozhou did not publish 2022-2024 government-fund revenue; the government-fund field uses the municipal audit-work-report figure as a transparent first-pass proxy.

Statistical-communique values are from a Ningbo Statistics Bureau reprint. Fiscal and fund values are from Shanghai Stock Exchange local-government bond disclosure files; debt balance is from a 2025 Ningbo government-bond tracking report. These fields should be OCR-checked against official final-account tables before journal submission.
Official statistical communique and municipal budget tables; debt balance uses the year-end local government bond balance table.

Official budget-execution report and statistical-communique reprint. GDP per capita is computed from official GDP and resident-population values because the communique reports GDP and population separately. Government-fund revenue is total government-fund budget revenue and retained as a land-finance proxy.
